title: Russian Oil Flows
summary:
Main
Image reference: Screenshot 2025-02-27 10.49.36.png | assets/2025-02-27_russian-oil-flows_img_screenshot2025-02-27104936_a69994670687.png
Reckoning the Past: Russian Oil's Journey to Asia
Before the Ukraine war, Russia had a diverse oil export market, supplying crude to Europe, China, and other regions without major restrictions. However, Western sanctions in response to Russia's invasion of Ukraine in 2022 reshaped global oil trade dynamics. The December 5, 2022, introduction of the $60 per barrel price cap by the G7 and the European Union marked a pivotal shift.
